CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(sugati__GM_Contact__r.Birthdate)), IF(DATE(2000, MONTH(sugati__GM_Contact__r.Birthdate), DAY(sugati__GM_Contact__r.Birthdate)) <= DATE(2000, MONTH(sugati__GM_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Departure_Date__c), DAY(sugati__GM_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Departure_Date__c)), YEAR(sugati__GM_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) - YEAR(sugati__GM_Contact__r.Birthdate), YEAR(sugati__GM_Opportunity__r.sugati__O_Departure_Date__c) - YEAR(sugati__GM_Contact__r.Birthdate) - 1), null)
CustomField.label: Age at Departure Date
